description_long: This is a full-size black computer keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout, including a numeric keypad on the right side. The surface is matte with slightly raised, rectangular keys that feature white printed characters and symbols. The keyboard has a low-profile design with a gently sloped top, and a visible cable extends from the center of the back edge for wired connectivity. Function keys, navigation keys, and media controls are present, making it suitable for office or home use. The casing appears to be made of hard plastic, and the keys are likely made of a similar but slightly textured plastic. There are no visible brand logos or additional decorative elements.
description: A full-size black wired keyboard with white-labeled keys, numeric keypad, and a matte plastic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main typing area and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and the cable extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cable attachment point and the back edge of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the numeric keypad and the keyboard's overall thickness.
